creator: me@niklaas.eu
text:
Created attachment 176058
Screenshot of missing graphs

Using the haproxy_ng plugin I encounter a lot of the following errors:

2016/10/22 12:55:12 [WARNING] Service HAPSessionsBack.mysql-write-backend on box-hlm-03/10.3.0.1:4949 returned no data for label mysql2

Consequently a lot of graphs are not shown, such as:

* Bandwidth usage by Backend
* Bandwidth usage by Frontend
* Response errors by backend
* Session rate by backend
* Uptime by servers

The only resource related to the issue I found is an abandoned issue on GitHub:

https://github.com/munin-monitoring/contrib/issues/294

I attached a screenshot. I will attach a log of all the errors.
